steps.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE c(x) AS (VALUES(1) UNION ALL SELECT x+1 FROM c WHERE x<30)
  SELECT stmtrand()%10 FROM c

WITH RECURSIVE c(x) AS (VALUES(1) UNION ALL SELECT x+1 FROM c WHERE x<30)
  SELECT stmtrand(0)%10 FROM c

WITH RECURSIVE c(x) AS (VALUES(1) UNION ALL SELECT x+1 FROM c WHERE x<30)
  SELECT stmtrand(1)%10 FROM c
